Contents Guideline Brief

Shake, Knead & Peel 🖤
Lindsay Modeling Mask Tutorial

No Bowl · No Tools · 1-Minute Mix · Cooling Effect

Lindsay re:natural Glucose Gel Modeling Pack — Blackmud
Key USP
🤌 No Tools Needed ❄️ Cooling Effect 🎉 Fun to Make 🖤 Oil Control 🧼 Pore Refining
Usage Method
  1. Open the pouch and take out the water-measuring spatula
  2. Use the spatula to add 8 spoons of water into pouch, then seal the zipper at the top
  3. Flip the pouch upside down and shake well so the powder and water mix evenly
  4. Knead the pouch to complete the modeling pack mixture
  5. Cut along the tear line on the bottom-right corner of the pouch
  6. Squeeze onto face — evenly spread from cheeks outward: cheeks → chin → forehead → nose. Make edges thick.
  7. Wait 15–20 min, peel off the hardened pack in one piece
  8. Finish by wiping with toner and applying basic skincare products
⚠️ Usage Precautions
  • Use cold distilled water for best cooling effect
  • Avoid eye area · Patch test before first use
  • 1 pouch = 1 use
💧 Texture Notes
Charcoal-black powder → transforms into smooth, cool, gel-rubber texture after mixing. Peels off in one satisfying piece. Use the most visually striking (darkest/most pigmented) color variant for filming — the blackmud tone gives the strongest on-camera contrast and hooking visual impact.
5 Variants Available
Blackmud
Teatree
Grain
Vegetable
Pink Salt
